title: San Felipe los Alzati Archaeological Zone
description: A pre-Hispanic site strategically located for ancient trade and defense. With ceremonial platforms, panoramic views, and preserved structures, it offers a quiet, educational escape into the region’s indigenous past.

title: El Cerrito de la Independencia
description: This hilltop monument commemorates Zitácuaro’s role in the independence movement. Surrounded by forest and overlooking the valley, it’s a peaceful place for reflection, photography, and historical appreciation.

title: EkoTurístico Lechuguillas
description: A forested eco-park offering hiking trails, cultural workshops, and nature-based activities. It’s a favorite among locals for weekend adventures and a great spot to experience Zitácuaro’s biodiversity.
